form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 5 lengths (22.42) behind Lightning Range in a Grade 5 on April 15. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fifth (26.33) over 460m at Warragul. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Won two starts back won at this course over 435m. Couldn't reproduced the effort last start when he finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 15 over 435m at this track behind Quick Response beaten 0.8 lengths (24.98). Hard to have without further improvement.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at this track over 435m (24.70) beating Dr. Louis in Grade 5 on April 15. Looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished eighth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Geelong over 400m. Mixing her form but shapes as a genuine chance under these conditions.
